title: taraxacum dentisquamosum
intro: Taraxacum dentisquamosum, also known as the Himalayan dandelion or mountain dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The plant is used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems and respiratory ailments, due to its ability to soothe and protect the body. Taraxacum dentisquamosum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for internal use, as well as topical creams and salves for external applications.
